## Type of Change / 变更类型

<!-- Please check the relevant option(s). / 请勾选相关选项。 -->

- [ ] Bug fix / Bug 修复
- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] Documentation / 文档更新
- [ ] Refactoring / 代码重构
- [ ] Style / 样式调整
- [ ] Performance / 性能优化
- [ ] Other / 其他

## Related Issues / 关联 Issue

<!-- Link any related issues: Fixes #123, Closes #456 / 关联相关 Issue -->

## Checklist / 检查清单

<!-- Please check all that apply. / 请勾选所有适用项。 -->

- [ ] I have tested my changes in the browser / 我已在浏览器中测试了更改
- [ ] Dark mode works correctly / 深色模式正常工作
- [ ] Responsive layout is preserved / 响应式布局正常
- [ ] No breaking changes / 无破坏性变更
- [ ] Code follows the existing style / 代码遵循现有风格
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic / 复杂逻辑已添加注释
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed) / 文档已更新（如需要）
